name: table
title: Table
author: mcpcn
description: Data table with optional single or multi-select modes for chat interfaces.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with single and multi-select modes
changelog.1.0.1: Added descriptive alt tags for title images
changelog.1.0.2: Added aria-label to filter removal button for screen reader accessibility
changelog.1.0.5: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.0.6: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.1.0.7: Inlined OpenAI display mode types to remove external lib dependency for shadcn distribution
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed onSelectionChange and onExpand actions. Selection and expand are now internal.
changelog.2.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.2.0.2: Removed unused checkbox from registry dependencies
changelog.2.0.3: Migrated from OpenAI Apps SDK to MCP Apps protocol for host communication
changelog.2.0.4: Removed stale sortedData from handleRowSelect dependency array
changelog.2.0.5: Fixed table preview not displaying data by passing demo columns and rows
changelog.2.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
